text.title: ui-lib-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ui-lib-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Prop explosion: adding leftIcon, rightIcon, loading, block, round, fullWidth, etc. as separate boolean/node props.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Proliferating props create a combinatorial surface that is impossible to test and confusing to use. Use cva() variants and slots (asChild / Slot) instead.

failure-mode.description: Storybook drift: shipping components without a *.stories.tsx file, relying on manual inspection.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Components without stories cannot be visually tested in CI or reviewed by designers. Agents mark "done" after the component file but skip stories under deadline pressure.

failure-mode.description: Barrel file without sideEffects: false in package.json.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Bundlers cannot tree-shake named exports from a barrel when sideEffects is missing or true, causing consumers to import the full library even when using one component.

failure-mode.description: CSS leakage: styles that affect elements outside the component via unscoped selectors (e.g., button { ... } in a module that uses :global).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Leaking styles create invisible coupling between components; adding one component breaks layout in unrelated parts of the consuming app.

failure-mode.description: Polymorphic as prop typed as a generic without a pinned PolymorphicProps helper.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Generic polymorphic typing breaks on LLM edits; the helper regresses to any, losing ref type safety. Pin a working PolymorphicProps and forbid rewrites.

failure-mode.description: Rule of one: extracting a component after the first usage rather than the third.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Premature abstraction freezes the API before patterns are understood. Apply the rule of three: extract only after three duplicates exist.

failure-mode.description: Agents over-abstract; force a "rule of three" — extract only after three duplicates exist.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Premature extraction locks the API before patterns are understood.

failure-mode.description: LLMs love prop explosion (Button leftIcon, rightIcon, loading, block, round); mandate cva() variants instead.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Combinatorial props are impossible to test and confusing to consume.

failure-mode.description: Default exports break refactoring; lint rule import/no-default-export saves hours.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Default exports cannot be safely renamed by refactoring tools.

failure-mode.description: Agents skip stories and tests under deadline; CI must reject components without *.stories.tsx + *.test.tsx.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Components without stories cannot be reviewed by designers or visually tested in CI.

failure-mode.description: Bundle size regressions sneak in via lodash and date libs; size-limit budget per primitive prevents drift.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Transitive dep additions are invisible without automated budgets enforced per export.

failure-mode.description: Polymorphic as typed in TS often regresses on agent edits — pin a working PolymorphicProps helper and forbid agents from rewriting it.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Generic polymorphic typing breaks silently and loses ref type safety when rewritten.
